artifacts_produced.infrastructure_files: migrations, config, templates, docs, CLI tool

cycles_per_completed_goal.note: 190 of 247 execution cycles (76.9%) went toward goals that were eventually completed

most_expensive_goals.title: Board hygiene: retire or consolidate stuck goals

streak_analysis.note: Blocked outcomes never chain — agent always recovers by pivoting to next task

email_checking_without_api_key.note: Pure overhead — no API key was ever provisioned. Eliminated by learning in cycle ~220

blocked_execution_cycles.note: Cycles where the agent attempted work but hit a wall

duplicate_or_redundant_cycles.note: Includes the triple-decomposition incident (cycle 73) and occasional rework

total_waste_estimate.note: 43 email + 21 blocked + 7 duplicates = 71 wasted entries out of 359 total

productive_utilization.note: ~80% of all agent activity produced forward progress

allocation_breakdown.note: Infrastructure slightly below content — reasonable for a system that builds its own tooling. Meta overhead (audits, retros) is moderate.

learning_rate_over_time.trend_note: Peak learning in weeks 2-3 (exploration phase), settling to ~60/week as domain saturates. Confidence stable at 0.73-0.79 — no inflation drift.

late_cycles_200_plus.block_rate: zero — agent stopped proposing goals requiring external credentials

efficiency_gain.block_elimination: 100% — from 8 blocked to 0 blocked in late phase
efficiency_gain.note: Agent learned its capability boundary and adapted goal selection accordingly. This is the clearest ROI signal: autonomous self-correction without human intervention.

cost_context.note: Agent runs on hourly LLM API calls. Each cycle = 1 API session. Without token-level cost tracking, ROI is stated in cycle-efficiency terms rather than dollar terms.
cost_context.waste_reduction_opportunity: Eliminating email checks alone would recover 43 cycles (12%)

key_roi_insights: 42 goals completed across 247 cycles at 4.5 cycles/goal median — the agent is efficient at scoped, internal work
99% first-attempt task success rate — almost no thrashing or retries on individual tasks
72-cycle longest productive streak — the agent can sustain productive output for weeks without intervention
80.2% productive utilization — ~20% waste, dominated by the now-eliminated email checking pattern
49% efficiency improvement from early to late cycles — the agent learned to avoid uncompletable goals
Binary capability cliff: 89-92% completion on internal goals, 10% on external-facing goals — credential walls are the single bottleneck
157 artifact files produced — tangible output including 12 content pieces, infrastructure, scripts, and tooling
521 learnings at stable confidence — the knowledge base grows without quality degradation
